description.unified: Launches an attack that bounces [3 times->4 times] starting from the nearest enemy, dealing M.DMG to each enemy hit. DMG increases by up to 100% the farther the enemy is. This attack is treated as a Normal Attack.
Deals M.DMG 2 time(s) to a random enemy and nearby enemies, and stuns them for [3 sec->1sec]. DMG increases by up to 200% the farther the enemy is.
Deals M.DMG 6 time(s) to enemies within range, knocks them back for 1.5sec, and reduces Crit Chance by [100%->60%] for [7 sec->4sec]. DMG increases by up to 150% the farther the enemy is.

Attacks the farthest enemy, dealing M.DMG, knocking them back for [2 sec->1sec], and [(added) increasing M.DMG taken by 20% for 6sec]. DMG increases by up to 200% the farther the enemy is. [(removed) When inflicted by CC, dispels negative effects]

light.unified: Damage increases by 50%. [(removed) Gains immunity to CC for the duration of Skill]

dark.unified: Stuns enemies hit for [2 sec->1 sec].

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [2 additional->2000], but the number of hits is increased by 2. [(removed) attacks random enemies 3 times]

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but targets the farthest enemy. [(removed) Ignores enemy Block]

light.unified: Damage increases by 50%. [(removed) Reduces ACC of hit enemies by 150 for 7 sec]

dark.unified: Reduces ACC of hit enemies by 500 for 4 sec. [(removed) increases Mana Cost by 1 and knock back over a long distance]

description.unified: [Pew!] Increases DMG by [{20%->{0}%}], and upon Critical Hit, recovers Mana by [{0}->200].
[Twinkle Twinkle] Reduces M.Crit Resist by {0}, and this reduction becomes irremovable. [(removed) Crit Chance Reduction will not be dispelled and duration increase]
[Gotcha!] reduces Cooldown by {0} sec and [(added) cleanses self when affected by a CC once every 20 sec]. [(removed) Greatly increases the knockback range]

dark.unified: Damage dealt to non-hero enemies is increased by [30%->15%], and damage taken is reduced by [30%->15%].

description.unified: Critical Damage is increased by {0}%, Normal Attack damage by {1}%, and Attack Range by {2}%.

Summons the Soul of Flower of Eternity, Hyacinth, dealing M.DMG to nearby enemies, freezing them for 5sec and knocking them back. Afterward, deals M.DMG to frozen enemies and increases own Crit DMG by 100% for 10sec.

1.from: Hit targets take increased M.DMG by 40% for 10 sec.
1.to: For the duration, increases Normal Attack range by 20%.
1.unified: For the duration, increases Normal Attack range by 20%. [(removed) Hit targets take increased M.DMG by 40% for 10 sec]

2.from: For the duration of Skill, increases the number of targets that Normal Attacks hit by 3. The range of Normal Attacks increases by 30%, knocking back the hit target.
2.to: For the duration, increases NFor the duration, Normal Attacks hit 2 targets and knock them back for 1 sec.ormal Attack range by 2%.
2.unified: For the duration, Normal Attacks hit 2 targets and knock them back for 1 sec. For the duration, Normal Attack range by [30%->2%]. [(removed) increases targets by 3]
